title: Symbiote
description:
Along your travels, you stumble upon a dark, amorphous polyp. You can sense that it is very old, and very evil.

[sine]Approach...[/sine]

options.title: Approach
options.requires: At least one Attack can be Enchanted

notes:
The Approach option enchants a selected Attack card with the [purple]Corrupted[/purple] enchantment. If no Attack cards in your deck can be enchanted, this option is locked and unavailable.

The Kill with Fire option allows you to transform cards to random other cards, and you may select up to 1 card to transform.
